welcome.title: Welcome to your wallet
welcome.subtitle: How would you like to get started?

create.title: Create a new wallet
create.body: Generate a fresh seed phrase. Recommended for new users.

importSeed.title: Import a seed phrase
importSeed.body: Restore a wallet using your 12 or 24 BIP-39 words.

importKey.title: Import a private key
importKey.body: Paste your XRPL family seed (starts with sEd... or s...).

ledger.title: Connect a Ledger device
ledger.body: Sign transactions on your hardware wallet. Available in a later release.

create.title: Your seed phrase
create.helper: 12 BIP-39 words that fully control this wallet.
create.body: Write these words down in order and keep them offline. Anyone with these words can access your funds.
create.disclaimer: We will ask you to confirm a few of them on the next step.

copy.warning: Clipboard will be cleared automatically in 60 seconds.

confirm.title: Confirm your seed phrase
confirm.body: Type the requested words exactly as shown earlier.

importSeed.title: Import your seed phrase
importSeed.body: Enter 12 or 24 BIP-39 words separated by spaces.
importSeed.label: Seed phrase
importSeed.helper: We expect {{count}} words. Case is ignored.

error.notInDict: One or more words are not in the BIP-39 dictionary.
error.invalidChecksum: Checksum is invalid — please double-check the words.

importKey.title: Import a private key
importKey.body: Paste an XRPL family seed (starts with sEd... or s...).
importKey.label: Private key
importKey.helper: The key stays on this device.

error.invalidFormat: Not a valid XRPL family seed.

setPassword.title: Protect your wallet
setPassword.body: This password encrypts your wallet on this device. We cannot recover it for you.
setPassword.requirements: At least 10 characters with mixed case, a digit, and a special character.

addMode.title: Add account
addMode.body: Enter your wallet password to encrypt the new account.

done.title: You're all set
done.body: Your wallet is ready to use. You can lock and unlock it anytime from settings.

ledger.title: Coming soon
ledger.body: Hardware wallet flow is being built (sprint W8). For now please use one of the seed-based options.

unlock.title: Welcome back
unlock.tagline: Sign in to your community wallet.
unlock.body: Enter your password to unlock the wallet.

error.cooldown: Too many attempts. Try again in {{sec}} seconds.

modal.title: Reset wallet?
modal.body: This permanently erases the encrypted wallet on this device. With your seed phrase you can import again — without it, funds are unrecoverable.
modal.helper: Case is ignored. This action cannot be undone.
